topic: Someone finds a wallet containing a large sum of cash
raw_output:
[story 1]

The worn leather of the old park bench felt strangely heavy beneath my fingertips. I’d been sitting there, trying to enjoy the afternoon quiet, when I noticed something tucked beneath the slats. Curiosity, a sudden, sharp prickle, made me reach down. It was a wallet, thick and dark, and as I pulled it out, a cascade of crisp bills spilled onto the damp grass. My breath hitched. I stared at the wad of cash, the numbers swimming before my eyes, a dizzying wave washing over me. My hands started to tremble, and I could feel a strange, hollow sensation in my chest. Who would this belong to?

[story 2]

It was the kind of Tuesday afternoon that usually offered nothing more than lukewarm coffee and the drone of distant traffic. Then, lying near the overflowing recycling bin, I found it. A leather wallet, surprisingly substantial. When I opened it, the sight of the currency inside caused my jaw to slacken. My eyes darted from one stack to the next, unable to process the sheer volume of money. I picked it up, the weight of it shocking my arm. I stood up slowly, my movements jerky, as if operating on a different kind of programming. A profound silence settled around me, broken only by the frantic drumming in my ears.

[story 3]

I was just taking a shortcut home, minding my own business, when I spotted the wallet near the curb. It was undeniably expensive-looking. When I retrieved it, the sheer quantity of banknotes inside hit me like a physical blow. My vision seemed to tunnel slightly. I dropped the wallet momentarily, then snatched it back up, my fingers fumbling with the edges of the leather. I leaned against a nearby lamppost, my gaze fixed entirely on the money, my lips parting slightly as if to ask a question that no one could hear. The world around me seemed to slow down to an agonizing crawl.
